channel.title: OSWM Watcher Changeset Activity - Curitiba
channel.description: OSM changeset activity monitoring and deletion watch for OpenSidewalkMap interest features in Curitiba.

item.title: [Activity] OSM Changeset 186094822 by smontbr (1 additions, 6 modifications, 0 deletions)
item.description:
OSM Changeset 186094822 by smontbr

Comment: Adições e correções gerais bem como exclusões de trilhas em áreas intangíveis.

Edits to OSWM features:

  • Additions (creations): 1
  • Modifications (tags/geom): 6
  • Deletions: 0

Links: OSM | OSMCha
